meta.title: Artistic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Argentina | Zaltyko - CGG
meta.description: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over CGG athletes, official categories, levels, Argentine Championship and licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over CGG athletes, official categories (Pre-Infantil to Absoluta), competition levels, selectivos and licenses. Argentine Championship and Juegos Deportivos Nacionales.

painPoints.generic: Managing federations, licenses and competitions on paper or Excel takes hours you could spend training. Information gets lost between coaches.
painPoints.specific: Renewing CGG licenses, managing provincial selectivos for Argentine Championship, tracking technical progress by category from Pre-Infantil to Absoluta.
